name: integration-points
question: How do other parts of the system use DDL generator?
decision: Primary consumer: SqlBackend users need to provision tables before executing queries. Integration: 1) Import generateDDL from @shogo/state-api/ddl, 2) Pass Enhanced JSON Schema (from schematic), 3) Execute returned SQL against database, 4) SqlBackend can then query tables. Secondary: Meta-store could generate DDL for runtime schemas.
rationale: DDL generator is infrastructure for SqlBackend. Fills gap identified in analysis (finding-ddl-sql-backend-gap). Standalone utility, no tight coupling. Pure function with no side effects.
